original_question: Lori wants to buy a $320.00 pair of shoes and a matching belt that is $32.00.  Her part-time job pays her $8.00 an hour.  How many hours will she have to work before she can make her purchase? Let's think step by step and output the final answer after "####".

similar_questions.question: Michael wants to buy a $250.00 gaming console and a $25.00 controller. His part-time job pays him $10.00 an hour. How many hours will he have to work before he can make his purchase?
Sarah wants to buy a $450.00 laptop and a $45.00 carrying case. Her part-time job pays her $9.00 an hour. How many hours will she have to work before she can make her purchase?
David wants to buy a $150.00 bicycle and a $15.00 helmet. His part-time job pays him $7.00 an hour. How many hours will he have to work before he can make his purchase?
Emma wants to buy a $600.00 phone and a $60.00 phone case. Her part-time job pays her $12.00 an hour. How many hours will she have to work before she can make her purchase?
Kevin wants to buy a $370.00 video game system and a $37.00 game. His part-time job pays him $11.00 an hour. How many hours will he have to work before he can make his purchase?
